introSection: Devil's Mine is a Vekoma roller coaster located at Fort Fun Abenteuerland in Wasserfall, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. The ride opened in 1996.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and black supports. The ride had red track and white supports when at Planet FunFun.

fullText:
Devil's Mine is a Vekoma roller coaster located at Fort Fun Abenteuerland in Wasserfall, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. The ride opened in 1996.



Red track and black supports. The ride had red track and white supports when at Planet FunFun.
